sentences.arabic: تَشْعُرُ مَرْيَمُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ حِينَ تَرْسُمُ أَوْ تَلْعَبُ الْمُوسِيقَى.
sentences.translation: Maryam se osjeća sretno kada crta ili svira muziku.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam feels happy when she draws or plays music.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النَّشَاطُ يُرِيحُ عَقْلَهَا وَيُسَعِّدُ قَلْبَهَا.
sentences.translation: Ova aktivnost odmara njen um i raduje njeno srce.
sentences.translationEn: This activity rests her mind and gladdens her heart.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ إِنْسَانٍ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى شَيْءٍ يُحِبُّهُ يَفْعَلُهُ.
sentences.translation: Svakom čovjeku treba nešto što voli da radi.
sentences.translationEn: Every person needs something they love to do.

sentences.translation: Hobi nam daje snagu da se suočimo s životom.
sentences.translationEn: A hobby gives us the strength to face life.
